seo.title: About | Coco Maya by Miss Bs | Little Italy San Diego
seo.descriptionTemplate: Coco Maya by Miss Bs is an elevated modern American coastal restaurant in Little Italy San Diego. Glass atrium, elevated patio, craft cocktails. {{street}}.

story.title: Modern Coastal, Elevated
story.body1Template: Coco Maya by Miss Bs is San Diego elevated modern American coastal dining destination. Situated at {{street}} in the heart of Little Italy, the restaurant is built around a stunning glass atrium bar, an elevated outdoor patio, and a kitchen that takes the food as seriously as the cocktails.
story.body2: The menu draws from modern American coastal culinary traditions — fresh seafood, bold flavors, and elevated classics — executed with fine dining precision in a setting that feels genuinely relaxed.
story.body3: A walk-in friendly rooftop patio, daily brunch, private events, and a cocktail program that draws from agave traditions and tropical coastal flavors.
story.imageAlt: In Love with the Coco neon sign at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego

experience.title: Indoor meets outdoor in the heart of Little Italy
experience.body1: The glass atrium bar connects seamlessly to the elevated outdoor patio. The design reflects the San Diego climate with lush botanical elements, warm natural materials, and a teal palette that ties the whole venue together.
experience.body2: Whether at the bar for an afternoon cocktail or seated on the patio for a private dinner, Coco Maya is a space that makes every occasion feel considered.
experience.imageAlt: Coco Maya bar looking out to the elevated patio in Little Italy
